params.description: Start of date range in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: end_date
params.description: End of date range in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: include_exclude_from_budgets
params.description: Enable to include categories that have the 'Exclude from Budgets' flag set in the returned `categories` array.

params.name: format
params.description: If `nested`, returns top-level categories (either category groups or categories not part of a category group) in alphabe

params.name: is_group
params.description:
If `false`, only categories not part of a category group are returned.
If `true`, only category groups are returned.
